nasb.text: They opened their mouth wide against me; They said, “Aha, aha, our eyes have seen it!”

esv.text: They open wide their mouths against me; they say, “Aha, Aha! Our eyes have seen it!”

cnv.text: 他們張大嘴巴攻擊我， 說：“啊哈！啊哈！ 我們親眼看見了。”

ccb.text: 他们高喊：“哈哈！哈哈！ 我们亲眼看见了。”

csbs.text: 他们对我张大嘴巴说： “啊哈！啊哈！我们的眼睛看到了！”
